speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Ah? It's you! [username], just in time for the fun.

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Today, we're making something crispy, golden, and dangerously delicious — Potato Wedges! Ready, [username]?

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Stick with me through every step. Don’t worry — if anything starts to burn, I’ve got your back!

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Before we dive in, let's quickly scan through our ingredients.

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Potatoes (cut in wedges)
Salted Water
Ginger-Garlic Paste
Oil for frying

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Dry Oregano
Corn-starch
Rice Flour
Refined Flour
Degi Red Chilli Powder
Asafoetida

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Tomato (chopped)
Onion (chopped)
Green Chillies
Coriander Leaves
Chaat Masala
Lemon Juice

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: [username], let’s prepare our seasoning mix first. Grab a bowl and get ready.

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Add oregano, corn-starch, rice flour, refined flour, chilli powder, and asafoetida. Nice and easy, [username].

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Mix it all together nicely. Perfect, [username]!

speaker: Guard
dialogue_text: If the mixture looks clumpy, just break the lumps with your fingers. Smooth and even is what we want.

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Now let's tackle the potatoes! Heat salted water in a large pot.

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Once the water starts boiling, add your potato wedges.

speaker: Guard
dialogue_text: If the potatoes break when you poke them, you've overcooked them! Pull them out earlier next time.

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Drain the potatoes and transfer them to a bowl. Nicely done, [username].

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Add the seasoning mix and coat them well. Make sure every wedge is covered, [username].

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Spread the coated wedges on a tray and let them cool completely.

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Heat oil in a kadai — medium heat for now.

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Drop in the cooled wedges gently and fry until they're cooked through.

speaker: Guard
dialogue_text: If the oil bubbles too aggressively, reduce the flame! We want frying, not fireworks.

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Remove the wedges onto a plate. Look at those, [username]!

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Sprinkle some salt and chilli powder on top of those crispy wedges. They already look irresistible!

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Now let’s prepare the Mexican salsa. Add chopped tomatoes, onions, green chillies, and coriander leaves.

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Next add salt, chaat masala, and lemon juice. Mix everything well — this salsa is fresh and zesty!

speaker: Guard
dialogue_text: If it's too sour, add a pinch of salt. If it's too spicy… well, good luck!

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Time to assemble! Place the crispy potato wedges on your serving plate, [username].

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Crispy outside, soft inside, cheesy on top — you absolutely nailed it!

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: See you next time, [username].

speaker: Robin
dialogue_text: Can’t wait for our next adventure!
